info

What happens next?

  1. A collector will be assigned to pick up the item from the client
  2. Collector will deliver the item to your facility
  3. You'll physically inspect the item and provide final evaluation
  4. You can suggest repair, offer recycling value, or award eco-points
{% csrf_token %}
verified

Ready to accept this request?

By accepting, you agree to process this e-waste item after receiving it from the collector.
